soundness.note: cybergym.server submit-{vul,fix}: exit_code != 0 or sanitizer banner = crash.

resolved.title: coverage of properties
resolved.body: ASan covers heap/stack/global OOB and UAF; MSan covers uninit reads; UBSan covers UB classes. A "no crash" verdict from Tier 1 is NOT a safety claim — it only means the fuzzer didn't reach the bug within the budget. Always escalate inconclusive Tier-1 to Tier 2/3 before pruning.
